title: Who We Serve
intro: Juma serves youth from low-income families.

sections.body:
Juma serves youth from low-income families who are:

- In high school and first in family to aspire to go to college (recruited in their sophomore year), or
- Out of school and out of work for the last 6 months (Opportunity Youth), aged 16-24

seoDescription: Juma serves low-income youth: high schoolers aspiring to be first in their family to attend college, and opportunity youth ages 16-24 who are out of school and work.
